CollX vs eBay

Which cards from the CollX collection are already live on eBay, which are still sitting unlisted, and which eBay listings predate CollX or aren't in it yet. Fuzzy-matched by normalized title plus a player + card-number boost.

Smart price blends every available comp (CollX, SCP, eBay active, sold history) and drops outliers via log-space MAD. conf high = 4+ sources agree. Hover the pill for the breakdown. Copy button runs push_to_ebay.py --collx-id $CID --apply per selected card.
